summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blog CMS implementation. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing covered admin passcode gate, category CRUD, post CRUD, content blocks, slug preview, and public blog pages. All features work correctly.

issues: Uses native browser date picker - inconsistent UX across devices (same as noted in iteration 1 for enquiry page)

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' in BlogManagerPage.jsx category select - this is a dev tools warning, not breaking but worth fixing for cleaner console
Console warning: 'Cannot infer the option value of complex children' - related to the category dropdown rendering
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed categories and posts during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog CMS fully implemented and working. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_blog_cms_api.py covers all blog API endpoints. Admin passcode is 'nb-manage-2026'. Seed data includes one blog post 'Designing a Regal Wedding Experience' in Weddings category with paragraph, full_image, and quote content blocks.

features_tested.admin_page_passcode_gate: PASS - Shows passcode form, no header/footer on /admin
features_tested.passcode_authentication: PASS - Correct passcode unlocks, wrong passcode shows error
features_tested.category_crud: PASS - Add, edit, delete categories all work
features_tested.post_creation: PASS - Full form with title, category, author, date, hero image, excerpt, SEO fields, content blocks
features_tested.slug_preview: PASS - Shows under title input, updates as user types
features_tested.post_editing: PASS - Form pre-fills with post data, heading changes to 'Edit Blog Post'
features_tested.content_blocks: PASS - Paragraph, quote, full_image blocks tested
features_tested.public_blog_page: PASS - Fetches from API, hero images load correctly, category filter works
features_tested.public_blog_detail: PASS - Fetches by slug, shows hero, content blocks, gallery, CTA section
